label: Largest Quantum Processor (Qubit Count)
source: IBM — IBM Condor (2023); Google Willow 105q below-threshold error correction (2024)
delta: IBM Condor holds raw qubit record; Quantinuum Helios leads in gate fidelity (99.921%)
deltaNote: IBM Nighthawk (120q) and Fujitsu/RIKEN (256q) added in 2025

label: Quantum Supremacy Claimed
contestNote: IBM disputed claim, arguing classical simulation was possible with enough disk space

label: Global Quantum Market (2025)
source: Network World — Top Quantum Breakthroughs 2025; CAGR ~32.7%, projected $5.3B by 2029
deltaNote: Projected to reach $5.3B by 2029 at 32.7% CAGR

label: Named Quantum Interpretations
source: Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy — Quantum Mechanics entry
contestNote: Debate over which interpretation, if any, is correct remains unresolved

label: Bell Inequality: Violated
source: Hensen et al. Nature 2015; Aspect et al. 1982; Giustina et al. 2015

label: Q-Day Estimate (Encryption Threat)
source: Google Security — Q-Day update March 2026; Caltech/Berkeley/Oratomic study April 2026
contestNote: Google moved estimate to 2029; most cryptographers place risk at 2030–2040. NIST finalized PQC standards in 2024 to address the transition.
